data.title: Opendoor Technologies, Inc. faces challenges in a difficult US housing market with high mortgage rates, weakened demand.
data.description: Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) is currently facing challenges in the U.S. housing market due to high mortgage rates and weakened demand. The CEO described the market as "very challenging," with cautious optimism expressed during the Q2 earnings call. The company's short-term outlook anticipates low volumes due to macroeconomic factors, leading to sequential revenue declines in the third and fourth quarters. Persistently high mortgage rates are suppressing buyer demand, indicating a tough road ahead for Opendoor. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
Board of Directors undergoes a reshuffle; new additions of 3 members; total count now stands at 10.

data.title: Marzetti Company (Nasdaq: MZTI) to release Q4 and FY 2025 results on Aug 21, 2025, with a conference call at 10 am ET. Webcast available on the company's website.
data.description: The Marzetti Company (Nasdaq: MZTI) from Westerville, Ohio, revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, August 21, 2025, before the market opens. They will conduct a conference call at 10:00 am ET on the same day to discuss these results, with the webcast available on their website, investors.marzetticompany.com. This update includes important details about the company's performance and aims to provide stakeholders with valuable insights.

data.title: Kubit introduces 'Ask Kubit', an AI interface for customer journey analytics, enabling plain English queries for instant answers from data.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in LOS ALTOS, California, the top customer journey analytics platform, Kubit, introduced Ask Kubit, a conversational AI interface. This innovative feature enables teams to inquire using simple language and obtain immediate responses from their data without the need for SQL programming.

data.title: Ramaco Resources, Inc. completes $200 million public offering by selling 10,666,667 shares of Class A stock.
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, on August 7, 2025, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB) disclosed the successful conclusion of its recent underwritten public offering of Class A common stock. The offering, which involved the sale of 10,666,667 shares, was finalized by the Company.

data.title: Hawai'i Gov. Josh Green will keynote at Novogradac 2025 Fall Affordable Housing Conference in Honolulu, addressing state-specific challenges and opportunities on Sept. 10-11.
data.description: The Novogradac 2025 Fall Affordable Housing Conference on September 10-11 in San Francisco will feature Hawai'i Gov. Josh Green as the keynote speaker. Attendees will discuss construction challenges and opportunities specific to the state. The conference aims to address important issues in affordable housing, with a focus on innovative solutions. With a diverse group of participants, the event is expected to draw in a significant number of stakeholders interested in the affordable housing sector. Governor Green's insights are anticipated to provide valuable perspectives on the current housing landscape in Hawai'i.

data.title: CATalyst Council conducts 40,000-household study to improve feline health, bridging care gap with emotional insights.
data.description: Annapolis, Maryland - CATalyst Council, in honor of International Cat Day on August 8th, has revealed plans for furthering their efforts in enhancing the feline veterinary industry and transforming the landscape of cat care by launching a comprehensive survey study. This nationwide initiative aims to gather insights from 40,000 households to address the feline care disparity and revolutionize the approach to cat-focused healthcare. The survey will delve into emotional, behavioral, and psychological aspects pertaining to feline well-being.

data.title: 2025 Principal Charity Classic raised record $10.6 million for Iowa youth; event raised $73 million since 2007.
data.description: The annual PGA TOUR Champions event, the Principal Charity Classic, held in Des Moines, Iowa, disclosed that the 2025 tournament has set a new record by raising an impressive $10.6 million for the support and benefit of Iowa youth programs and initiatives, the highest amount in its history. This brings the total charitable contribution from the event to over $73 million since 2007 when Principal Financial Group® took on the role of title sponsor. Board chair for the charity, Ken McCullum, highlighted that this milestone underscores the steadfast dedication of the community in rallying behind the youth of Iowa.

data.title: Tandem Diabetes reported $240.678 million in sales, missing earnings with a loss of 78 cents per share. Stocks dropped due to the dull outlook.
data.description: Tandem Diabetes Care Inc. saw a decline in stock value after revising its annual guidance. The diabetes company reported an adjusted loss of 78 cents per share, missing the expected loss of 40 cents. However, they reported sales of $240.678 million, exceeding expectations of $238.57 million, showing an increase of 8% year over year. Shipments in the United States totaled around 21,000 pumps, while international shipments were about 9,000 pumps. Tandem narrowed its fiscal 2025 sales guidance to $1 billion from the earlier range of $997 million-$1.01 billion, compared to the consensus of $1.004 billion. These adjustments were made based on insights gained in the first half of the year. Leigh Vosseller, the CFO, highlighted expectations for U.S. growth, pharmacy channel initiatives, and international sales.

data.title: "Global White Hydrogen Market to reach $56.8 million by 2030, growing at 7.1% CAGR. Naturally occurring and cost-effective clean energy alternative."
data.description: The global white hydrogen market is projected to reach $56.8 million by 2030, with a growth rate of 7.1% between 2025-2030. This market study by BCC Research delves into the sources of white hydrogen and its potential as a clean energy alternative. White hydrogen, derived largely from natural sources like ultramafic rocks and volcanic activity, is gaining attention for its cost-effectiveness and ease of extraction compared to green or blue hydrogen. Technological advancements in exploration tools are facilitating the discovery and extraction of white hydrogen, reducing risks and costs. This report is crucial in the context of ongoing efforts to reduce carbon emissions globally. The urgent need for sustainable energy solutions is driving interest in white hydrogen, prompting increased exploration and research efforts to leverage its potential.

data.title: Eli Lilly Co. reported strong Q2 2025 earnings with revenue growing 38% yoy, EPS increasing by 61% to $6.31, and revenue guidance raised to $60-62 billion for the year. Strategic initiatives include new drug launches, clinical trials, and global expansions. Collaboration with the administration for drug pricing reforms being discussed.
data.description: Eli Lilly Co. reported its second-quarter 2025 financial results, with revenue growing by 38% compared to Q2 2024, reaching $5.2 billion. The company shared top-line clinical data from the ATTAIN 1 trial, showing patients lost 27 pounds on orforglipron. They also highlighted key milestones like FDA approval for new dosing for Kisandla and positive results in various Phase 3 trials. The company distributed $1.3 billion in dividends, executed $700 million in share repurchases, and raised revenue guidance to $60-62 billion for 2025. Non-GAAP earnings per share increased by 61% to $6.31, with strong performances from key products like Mounjaro and Sepban. Lilly also discussed challenges in the US pharmaceutical market and their commitment to reducing patient costs and enhancing access to medicines. They are aiming for future growth by increasing R&D investment and production capacity, including plans for new manufacturing facilities in the US. Overall, the company's financial performance in the first half of 2025 was robust, leading to increased revenue and earnings per share guidance for the year.

data.title: Hyatt Hotels stock rises as Q2 earnings beat estimates: EPS 68 cents (vs. 65 cents), sales $1.81B (vs. $1.73B). RevPAR up 1.6%. Net room growth 11.8%. Gross fees $301M. Adjusted EBITDA $303M.
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) shares experienced a rise in trading on Thursday following the release of their second-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 68 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 65 cents. Quarterly sales reached $1.81 billion, exceeding the expected $1.73 billion. Comparable system-wide hotel revenue per available room (RevPAR) saw a 1.6% increase compared to the same quarter in 2024. Net rooms also saw a notable growth of 11.8% year over year, or 6.5% without factoring in acquisitions. Gross fees amounted to $301 million, marking a 9.5% increase from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter totaled $303 million, a 1.1% decrease year over year but reflecting a 9.0% increase on a pro forma basis. These details and more can be found in the complete article on benzinga.com.

data.title: Animoca introduces NUVA marketplace integrating RWA sector; features stablecoin securities and HELOCs on Provenance Blockchain.
data.description: NUVA utilizes the Provenance Blockchain to provide institutional-grade tokenized assets, including stablecoin securities and Home Equity Line of Credits (HELOCs).

data.title: Radiance Solar appoints Todd Shutley as COO, with past roles at Truist Bank. Shutley's experience positions him well for his new role.
data.description: Radiance Solar, a prominent solar EPC company, has appointed Todd Shutley as their new COO. Shutley, who previously served as COO at Inlight Real Estate Partners and held various senior roles at Truist Bank, brings a wealth of operational leadership experience to his new role. This move highlights Radiance Solar's commitment to strengthening its executive team. Todd Shutley's expertise will play a key role in the company's strategy going forward.
